# ── LangGraph + LangChain ──────────────────────────
langgraph==0.2.28
langchain==0.3.7
langchain-community==0.3.7
langchain-core>=0.3.17
langchain-groq==0.2.1

# ── Document Parsing ───────────────────────────────
mineru[all]              # PDF/image parser — layout analysis, table recognition,
                         # built-in OCR, native page-range batching to prevent OOM
lxml                     # required by pandas.read_html() for MinerU table parsing
pymupdf                  # fitz — page counting for batch slicing + document_loader.py
easyocr                  # OCR — imported by OcrExtractor / document_loader.py
tika                     # Apache Tika — legacy .doc files

# ── Word / Excel ───────────────────────────────────
python-docx==1.1.2       # .docx parsing (_parse_docx + document_loader.py)
openpyxl==3.1.5          # Excel support
pandas==2.2.3

# ── Data Validation ────────────────────────────────
pydantic==2.9.2

# ── Utilities ──────────────────────────────────────
python-dotenv==1.0.1
httpx==0.27.2
pyyaml>=6.0                  # YAML config loader for config/config.yaml

# ── REMOVED ────────────────────────────────────────
# docling   → replaced by MinerU (resolved std::bad_alloc OOM on large PDFs)
